DbtCloudSpec.description: dbt Cloud configuration for pre-sync running-job checks.

credentialsFile.description: Path to the dbt Cloud credentials file. Defaults to `~/.dbt/dbt_cloud.yml`.

description: Spec for `kind: Connection`. Holds external data connection info referenced by Assets.

dbtCloud.description: Optional dbt Cloud configuration for running-job checks before sync.

identity.description: Reference to a `kind: Identity` resource for authentication scope.

profilesDir.description: Directory containing profiles.yml. If omitted, uses `~/.dbt/`.

target.description: If omitted, the default target in profiles.yml is used.

executionProject.description: GCP project ID used for query execution billing. Defaults to `project` if omitted.

identity.description: Reference to a `kind: Identity` resource for authentication scope.

keyfile.description: Path to the service account JSON key file. Required when `method` is `service-account`.

method.description: Authentication method. `oauth` (Application Default Credentials) or `service-account`. Defaults to `oauth`.

project.description: GCP project ID that contains the dataset.

timeout.description: Query timeout (e.g. "30s", "1h"). Falls back to `NagiConfig::default_timeout` when omitted.

identity.description: Reference to a `kind: Identity` resource for authentication scope.

path.description: Path to the DuckDB database file.

oneOf.description: Snowflake SQL REST API connection with Key-Pair JWT authentication.

identity.description: Reference to a `kind: Identity` resource for authentication scope.

privateKeyPath.description: Path to the RSA private key file (PKCS#8 PEM format) for JWT authentication.

role.description: Role to use for the session. Uses the user's default role if omitted.

timeout.description: Query timeout (e.g. "30s", "1h"). Falls back to `NagiConfig::default_timeout` when omitted.

title: ConnectionSpec
